## Summary

Describe the changes in this pull request at a high level.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior or bug fixes.
- [ ] Docs updated (README, docs/ user guides, or API reference) if behavior or public API changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under Unreleased) if this change should be called out in a release.
- [ ] `ruff check .`, `ruff format .`, and `mypy capper` all pass locally.
- [ ] `pytest capper/tests -m "not benchmark"` passes locally.
